summary: Documentation & Cyber Services website for a business in Barh, Patna, Bihar. Includes service request forms, file uploads, admin panel, and home tuition section.
architectural_notes: Business contact: WhatsApp/Phone 9102171138, Address: Kajichak Dhelbagosain Road, Barh, Patna, Bihar - 803213
Admin panel uses Internet Identity for secure login
Service request form supports file uploads and status tracking (Pending/Processing/Completed)

existing_features.title: Add a floating WhatsApp button fixed to the bottom-right corner of every page that opens a WhatsApp chat with the number 9102171138. The button should be clearly visible and use the standard WhatsApp green color with the WhatsApp icon.
Add a 'Call Now' button/link in the header, footer, and/or Documentation page hero section that triggers a phone call to 9102171138 (tel:9102171138) when clicked.

Add a 'Visit Centre' button/section in the Documentation page and footer that displays the business address: Kajichak Dhelbagosain Road, Barh, Patna, Bihar - 803213. The button or section should clearly show the full address so users know where to visit.

Add Call Now button with phone number 9102171138
